title: Form No. 121 – Declaration for Receipt of Income Without TDS
description: Declaration form under section 393(6) for individuals and eligible persons to receive certain incomes (interest, dividends, insurance commission, rent, mutual fund units, PF balance, life insurance) without deduction of tax at source. Replaces the earlier Form 15G and Form 15H with effect from 01-04-2026.

title: ECS Mandate Form ECS-I
description: Electronic Clearing Service (ECS) credit clearing mandate form for Post Office account holders to receive MIS, SCSS, or TD interest directly into their bank savings account. Requires MICR code and cancelled cheque or passbook copy for bank verification.

title: Account Opening Form SB-AOF
description: Form for opening a new Post Office Savings Bank account or purchasing a savings certificate. Covers Savings, RD, TD, MIS, SCSS, PPF, SSA, KVP, and NSC schemes. Includes nomination and declaration sections.

title: KYC Form SB-KYC
description: Know Your Customer (KYC) form for new account holders or for updating existing KYC details at a Post Office Savings Bank. Captures identity proof, address proof, Aadhaar, and PAN details.

title: ATM / Internet / Mobile Banking Form SB-ATM1
description: Service request form for Post Office Savings Bank ATM card issuance, internet banking, mobile banking, and SMS banking. Also covers ATM card replacement, PIN request, hot-listing, and linking of secondary accounts.
file: ATM Internet Mobile Banking Form SB-ATM1.pdf

title: Pay in Slip SB-103
description: Deposit slip for Post Office Savings Bank accounts including SB, RD, TD, MIS, SCSS, PPF, SSA, KVP, and NSC. Contains counterfoil for customer and office copy with denomination details.

title: Withdrawal Form SB-7
description: Form for withdrawing money or claiming interest from a Post Office Savings Bank account (SB, TD, MIS, SCSS, NSS). Supports payment to self or through a messenger.

title: Account Closure Form SB-7A
description: Form used for closing a Post Office Savings Bank account on maturity. Covers SB, RD, TD, MIS, SCSS, PPF, SSA, KVP, and NSC accounts. Payment can be credited to SB account, cheque, or cash.

title: Pre-Mature Closure Form SB-7B
description: Application for closing a Post Office Savings Bank account before its maturity date. Applicable for RD, TD, MIS, SCSS, PPF, SSA, and KVP accounts. Includes penalty deduction details.

title: Loan / Withdrawal from RD / PPF / SSA Form SB-7C
description: Application for taking a loan or making a partial withdrawal from RD, PPF, or SSA (Sukanya Samriddhi Account) at a Post Office.
file: Loan Withdrawal RD PPF SSA Form SB-7C.pdf

title: Cheque Facility Request Form SB-CQE-4
description: Application for availing cheque facility or issuing a fresh cheque book for a Post Office Savings Account. Includes acknowledgement section for receipt of cheque book.

title: Standing Instructions Form SB-83
description: Application for setting up automatic transfer (standing instructions) between Post Office accounts — such as SB to RD, or MIS/SCSS/TD interest credit to SB account.

title: Account Extension Form SB-EXT1
description: Application for extending the tenure of RD, TD, PPF, or SCSS accounts at a Post Office after their maturity date, as per applicable scheme provisions.

title: Duplicate Pass Book Form SB-41
description: Application for issuance of a duplicate passbook for a National Small Savings Scheme account at a Post Office, in case of loss, damage, or spoiling of the original passbook.

title: Account Transfer Form (Form-5)
description: Application for transferring a National Savings Scheme account from one Post Office to another. Covered under Rule 13 of Government Savings Promotion Rules, 2018.

title: Account Pledging Form (Form-7)
description: Application for pledging a National Small Savings Scheme account as security with a government authority, bank, or cooperative institution. Covered under Rule 16 of Government Savings Promotion Rules, 2018.

title: Letter of Authority – Physical Infirmity (Form-12)
description: Form authorising another person to open or operate a National Savings Scheme account on behalf of a depositor suffering from physical infirmity including blindness. Covered under Rule 11 of Government Savings Promotion Rules, 2018.
file: Letter of Authority Physical Infirmity Form-12.pdf

title: Nomination Cancellation / Variation Form (Form-10)
description: Application for cancelling or changing the nomination in a National Savings Scheme account at a Post Office. Covered under Rule 14 of Government Savings Promotion Rules, 2018.

title: Deceased Depositor Settlement Form (Form-11)
description: Application by nominee or legal heirs for settlement of a deceased depositor's National Small Savings account. Requires death certificate, indemnity, affidavit, or succession certificate as applicable. Covered under Rule 15 of Government Savings Promotion Rules, 2018.

title: Affidavit (Form-13)
description: Affidavit to be submitted by legal heirs of a deceased depositor, declaring themselves as the only heirs entitled to the deceased's National Savings account balance. Covered under Rule 15 of Government Savings Promotion Rules, 2018.

title: Letter of Disclaimer (Form-14)
description: Letter of disclaimer on affidavit by legal heirs relinquishing their claim on a deceased depositor's National Savings account balance in favour of another claimant. Covered under Rule 15 of Government Savings Promotion Rules, 2018.

title: Letter of Indemnity (Form-15)
description: Letter of indemnity submitted by legal heirs of a deceased depositor seeking payment without a succession certificate or letters of administration, with sureties. Covered under Rule 15 of Government Savings Promotion Rules, 2018.

title: Protected Savings Claim Form SB-101
description: Form for claiming the full maturity value under the Scheme of Protected Savings for a 5-year Post Office Recurring Deposit account in the event of the depositor's death.

title: Certificate Transfer Between Post Offices
description: Application for transferring Post Office savings certificates (NSC/KVP) from one Post Office to another. Includes particulars of nomination under the Government Savings Certificate Act 1959.

title: Certificate Transfer Between Persons (NC-34 Annexure-2)
description: Application for transferring Post Office savings certificates from one person to another (not as pledge). Includes transferee declaration and details of certificates. Covered under para 41(1) of Department of Posts rules.

title: POSB CBS Forms (Master)
description: Complete collection of all Post Office Savings Bank CBS forms including account opening, KYC, ATM, withdrawal, closure, nomination, transfer, and certificate forms.
